title: Better Sky
description: Enhances the game with a beautiful custom sky.
body:
[My Website](https://pandadev.net) **Works with every other resource pack, just put it on the very top** ***

Adds a beautiful custom sky to Minecraft. Works with the formats MCPatcher and Optifine. If you use [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) you have to install [FabricSkyBoxes](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabricskyboxes) for it to work. *** Check out my other projects on [my profile](https://modrinth.com/user/PandaDEV)
